programme.title: Live: Wimbledon
programme.desc: Coverage of the men's singles final, which takes place at the All England Club, as the winner of the third Grand Slam title of the year is decided. This is the first such final since 2022 that won't involve Carlos Alcaraz, who missed the tournament through injury, leaving world number one Jannik Sinner as favourite to build on his triumph of last year. Sinner became the first Italian to win the men's singles here, but a tough time in the early rounds and an early exit at the French Open suggest he won't have things all his own way this year.
